bullets: Pray for Christians in the Democratic Republic of Congo as ADF militants continue killing and kidnapping believers, asking God to end the violence, comfort the bereaved, and protect communities facing both armed attacks and Ebola outbreak.

Ask God to bring full justice for Pakistani Christians still waiting for accountability thirteen years after a deadly church bombing and after a 2023 mob assault, and grant courage to authorities to uphold court orders protecting the vulnerable.

Lift up the two Ugandan converts recently released after nearly two years imprisoned for leaving Islam, asking God to sustain their faith and shield all former Muslims facing hostility for following Christ in Uganda.

Pray for six house church leaders detained in China on fabricated charges related to Sunday school classes and offerings, asking God to grant them endurance and bring about a just outcome for them and their families.
Ask God to protect environmental and faith defenders in Honduras and secure full justice for all whose lives are endangered by corruption and violence.
Pray for the farming families and workers in Honduras, that God would bring safety and healing to communities shattered by deadly violence on a palm plantation.
Pray for the grieving families of the 26 people killed in the tourist attack in India, and for lasting peace and security in the affected region.
Ask God for justice and protection for the hundreds of detained activists from many nations held in Israel, especially those who report abuse, and for wisdom among all leaders involved.
Lift up the civilians and displaced people of Gaza, that humanitarian aid would reach them swiftly and that a lasting, just path toward stability and recovery would emerge.
Pray for the children and families struck by the attack on a school and dormitory in occupied Ukraine, and for the protection of all civilians caught in the ongoing conflict.
Lift up the bereaved families of the paramedics and child killed in Lebanon, and ask God to protect emergency responders and civilians from further harm across the country.
Pray for the more than 1.6 million displaced people in Lebanon, especially those with disabilities and the most vulnerable, that shelter, aid, and peace would reach them.
Ask God to give wisdom to leaders in Bolivia and to protect ordinary citizens suffering food and fuel shortages as political unrest and blockades deepen the country's crisis.
Pray for migrants living in fear across South Africa, that communities would choose compassion over hostility and that authorities would act to protect the vulnerable.
Lift up journalists imprisoned in Turkey and their families, asking God to uphold truth, protect those who report it, and bring justice to their cases.
Pray for the Cuban people and for the families of all those killed in the 1996 aircraft shootings, that truth, accountability, and reconciliation would prevail.

Pray for communities across the Pacific Rim — in Chile, Hawaii, Japan, and the Philippines — still shaped by the legacy of history's most powerful recorded earthquake, that generational trauma would find healing.
Pray for residents in the southern Philippines who felt recent seismic activity, asking God to grant peace of mind and continued safety as they live in an active earthquake zone.
Lift up coastal communities in Indonesia who experienced an undersea earthquake, asking God for protection from any delayed effects and comfort for those unsettled by the shaking.
Ask God to guard remote communities in the Solomon Islands following a shallow earthquake, providing safety and calm to those in hard-to-reach areas with limited outside support.
Pray for the people of Papua New Guinea near the country's second-largest city who felt recent seismic activity, asking God for protection, stability, and freedom from fear.
